=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/redundantOrDie.ts(10,40): warning TS377096: This generator applies `Effect.orDie` to every yielded effect. Hoist it once to the generator result: `Effect.gen(...).pipe(Effect.orDie)`, or `Effect.fn(function*(){ ... }, Effect.orDie)`. effect(redundantOrDie)
/.src/redundantOrDie.ts(17,65): warning TS377096: This generator applies `Effect.orDie` to every yielded effect. Hoist it once to the generator result: `Effect.gen(...).pipe(Effect.orDie)`, or `Effect.fn(function*(){ ... }, Effect.orDie)`. effect(redundantOrDie)
/.src/redundantOrDie.ts(24,51): warning TS377096: This generator applies `Effect.orDie` to every yielded effect. Hoist it once to the generator result: `Effect.gen(...).pipe(Effect.orDie)`, or `Effect.fn(function*(){ ... }, Effect.orDie)`. effect(redundantOrDie)


==== /.src/redundantOrDie.ts (3 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    // @effect-diagnostics redundantOrDie:warning
    // @effect-diagnostics unnecessaryEffectGen:off
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    
    declare const first: Effect.Effect<number, unknown>
    declare const second: Effect.Effect<string, unknown>
    declare const third: Effect.Effect<boolean, unknown>
    
    export const shouldReport = Effect.gen(function*() {
                                           ~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377096: This generator applies `Effect.orDie` to every yielded effect. Hoist it once to the generator result: `Effect.gen(...).pipe(Effect.orDie)`, or `Effect.fn(function*(){ ... }, Effect.orDie)`. effect(redundantOrDie)
!!! related TS377097 /.src/redundantOrDie.ts(11,31): This repeated `Effect.orDie` site participates in the hoistable generator-wide `orDie`. effect(redundantOrDie)
!!! related TS377097 /.src/redundantOrDie.ts(12,32): This repeated `Effect.orDie` site participates in the hoistable generator-wide `orDie`. effect(redundantOrDie)
      const a = yield* first.pipe(Effect.orDie)
      const b = yield* second.pipe(Effect.orDie)
    
      return [a, b] as const
    })
    
    export const shouldReportEffectFn = Effect.fn("service.method")(function*() {
                                                                    ~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377096: This generator applies `Effect.orDie` to every yielded effect. Hoist it once to the generator result: `Effect.gen(...).pipe(Effect.orDie)`, or `Effect.fn(function*(){ ... }, Effect.orDie)`. effect(redundantOrDie)
!!! related TS377097 /.src/redundantOrDie.ts(18,31): This repeated `Effect.orDie` site participates in the hoistable generator-wide `orDie`. effect(redundantOrDie)
!!! related TS377097 /.src/redundantOrDie.ts(19,32): This repeated `Effect.orDie` site participates in the hoistable generator-wide `orDie`. effect(redundantOrDie)
      const a = yield* first.pipe(Effect.orDie)
      const b = yield* second.pipe(Effect.orDie)
    
      return [a, b] as const
    })
    
    export const shouldReportMixedStyles = Effect.gen(function*() {
                                                      ~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377096: This generator applies `Effect.orDie` to every yielded effect. Hoist it once to the generator result: `Effect.gen(...).pipe(Effect.orDie)`, or `Effect.fn(function*(){ ... }, Effect.orDie)`. effect(redundantOrDie)
!!! related TS377097 /.src/redundantOrDie.ts(25,31): This repeated `Effect.orDie` site participates in the hoistable generator-wide `orDie`. effect(redundantOrDie)
!!! related TS377097 /.src/redundantOrDie.ts(26,20): This repeated `Effect.orDie` site participates in the hoistable generator-wide `orDie`. effect(redundantOrDie)
      const a = yield* first.pipe(Effect.orDie)
      const b = yield* Effect.orDie(second)
    
      return [a, b] as const
    })
    
    export const shouldNotReportMissingOrDie = Effect.gen(function*() {
      const a = yield* first.pipe(Effect.orDie)
      const b = yield* second
    
      return [a, b] as const
    })
    
    export const shouldNotReportOneYield = Effect.gen(function*() {
      return yield* first.pipe(Effect.orDie)
    })
    
    export const shouldNotReportNonTrailingOrDie = Effect.gen(function*() {
      const a = yield* first.pipe(
        Effect.orDie,
        Effect.map((value) => value + 1)
      )
      const b = yield* second.pipe(Effect.orDie)
    
      return [a, b] as const
    })
    
    export const shouldNotReportNestedMissingOrDie = Effect.gen(function*() {
      yield* first.pipe(Effect.orDie)
    
      yield* Effect.gen(function*() {
        yield* second.pipe(Effect.orDie)
        yield* third
      })
    })
